chief_complaint: A 29-year-old postpartum woman presented with recurrent episodes of chest pain, palpitations, and a fear of dying.
history: The patient had five ED visits over two months, each following emotionally distressing interactions with her estranged spouse. Cardiac and medical evaluations were consistently unremarkable. She had a history of postpartum depression and was previously on sertraline, but it was discontinued. She also had a history of somatic symptoms.
exam: Vital signs were not provided. Physical examination findings were not mentioned.
labs: ECG, bloods, and imaging were performed, but results were unremarkable.
